description: Every metric the Orbit stack emits, grouped by domain. Use the component dashboards for focused views.

panels.description: HTTP server request latency (autoinstrumentation).

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.5, sum by (le, http_route, http_response_status_code, http_request_method) (rate(http_server_request_duration_seconds_bucket{container="gkg-webserver", cluster=~"$cluster"}[5m])))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, http_route, http_response_status_code, http_request_method) (rate(http_server_request_duration_seconds_bucket{container="gkg-webserver", cluster=~"$cluster"}[5m])))

histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, http_route, http_response_status_code, http_request_method) (rate(http_server_request_duration_seconds_bucket{container="gkg-webserver", cluster=~"$cluster"}[5m])))

panels.title: http_server_request_duration_seconds — p50/p95/p99

panels.title: gkg_etl_permits_active

panels.description: Total bytes that the archive extractor refused to write to disk, summed from the tar header sizes of skipped entries. Same `reason` labels as `gkg.indexer.code.archive.entries.skipped`.
panels.title: gkg_indexer_code_archive_bytes_skipped_bytes_total — rate/s

panels.description: Tar archive entries dropped before extraction so they never touch disk. Reasons: `excluded_extension` (basename matches the binary-asset / media / archive denylist in `code-graph::v2::config::filter::EXCLUDED_INDEXING_GLOBS`), `oversize` (declared size exceeds the configured per-file ceiling).
panels.title: gkg_indexer_code_archive_entries_skipped_total — rate/s

panels.description: Task-level code indexing failures by pipeline stage. Increments only when a code indexing task ends with a fatal pipeline error (sink write, thread pool, sentinel spawn, internal panic). Per-file failures land in `gkg.indexer.code.file_faults` instead, so this rate is suitable for alerting.
panels.title: gkg_indexer_code_errors_total — rate/s

panels.description: Total push events processed by the code indexing handler.
panels.title: gkg_indexer_code_events_processed_total — rate/s

panels.description: Per-file failures during code indexing, by kind. The task itself completes successfully; individual files were excluded from the graph. Kinds: `file_read`, `invalid_utf8`, `syntax_error`, `oxc_panic`, `oxc_semantic`, `analyzer_panic`, `unknown_source_type`, `embedded_script_parse`, `rust_workspace_missing`.
panels.title: gkg_indexer_code_file_faults_total — rate/s

panels.description: Total files seen by the code-graph indexer.
panels.title: gkg_indexer_code_files_processed_total — rate/s

panels.description: Source files skipped by the code-graph indexer for policy or watchdog reasons. Not an error. Reasons: `oversize`, `oversize_combined`, `line_too_long`, `minified`, `not_utf8`, `non_regular_file`, `unsafe_path`, `timeout_sentinel`.
panels.title: gkg_indexer_code_files_skipped_total — rate/s
